diff:
diff --git a/src/rollover.py b/src/rollover.py
index c66da30..7f1a6eb 100644
--- a/src/rollover.py
+++ b/src/rollover.py
@@ -1,4 +1,6 @@
 def previous_month(year, month):
     if month < 1 or month > 12:
         raise ValueError("invalid month")
-    return year, max(month - 1, 1)
+    if month == 1:
+        return year - 1, 12
+    return year, month - 1
